title: Aulomyrcia cassinioides
taxonomy: Aulomyrcia cassinioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to South America and belongs to the genus Aulomyrcia. Aulomyrcia cassinioides is further classified under the family Myrtaceae, which is a group of plants commonly known as the myrtle family. The plant's classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other species in the Myrtaceae family. Aulomyrcia cassinioides is also classified as a dicotyledonous plant, indicating its seed-producing structure.
